blocks.title: What we do
paragraphs: Kite gives plant managers the same real-time visibility that used to be reserved for Fortune 500 operations.
bullets: Connect PLCs and MES in days, with no new hardware on the line
Turn plant-floor signals into a live cost-of-downtime dashboard
Route alerts to the right shift lead the moment something drifts

items.label: average downtime reduction across 24 pilot plants
average time to go live per site

blocks.title: How it works
bullets: Plug-and-play adapters read existing PLC/MES signals — no rip and replace
A cost-of-downtime model turns raw signals into euros per minute
Alerts and weekly digests reach the shift lead, not just head office
